translations.Two-Factor Gateway: WhatsApp API authent: Two-Factor Gateway: WhatsApp API authentication failed
translations.The authentication with WhatsApp API has: The authentication with WhatsApp API has failed. The Two-Factor Gateway (WhatsApp) will not work until this is resolved. Please reconfigure the WhatsApp gateway using the command line tool.
translations.The phone number is not registered on Wh: The phone number is not registered on WhatsApp.
Authentication failed with WhatsApp API. Please verify username/password or log in again.
translations.Two-factor gateway providers (Signal, SM: Two-factor gateway providers (Signal, SMS, Telegram, WhatsApp, XMPP)
translations.A set of Nextcloud two-factor providers: A set of Nextcloud two-factor providers to send authentication codes via Signal, SMS, Telegram, WhatsApp and XMPP.
translations.You are not using {displayName} for two-: You are not using {displayName} for two-factor authentication at the moment.
translations.Could not verify your code. Please try a: Could not verify your code. Please try again.
translations.Enter your identification (e.g. phone nu: Enter your identification (e.g. phone number to start the verification):
translations.A confirmation code has been sent to {ph: A confirmation code has been sent to {phone}. Please insert the code here:
translations.Your account was successfully configured: Your account was successfully configured to receive messages via {displayName}.
translations.An access code has been sent to %s: An access code has been sent to %s
translations.Error while sending the Message. Please: Error while sending the Message. Please try again later or contact the administrator.
translations.Your phone number has changed and had no: Your phone number has changed and had not been re-verified. Use a different two-factor mechanism or contact your admin.
translations.Protect your account with one-time login: Protect your account with one-time login codes sent by SMS.
translations.Add your mobile number to receive one-ti: Add your mobile number to receive one-time sign-in codes by SMS.
translations.Use your saved phone number or choose an: Use your saved phone number or choose another number for SMS verification.
translations.Choose your country and enter your numbe: Choose your country and enter your number to receive login codes by SMS.
translations.Choose a country and enter the phone num: Choose a country and enter the phone number in international format.
A confirmation code was sent to {phone}.
translations.Choose a country and enter a valid phone: Choose a country and enter a valid phone number in international format.
